ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-25-2022 Continued To Oct-10-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Sheila Robello, via Zoom, for Thomas Lucas, Personal Representative.

Ms. Robello offers an update regarding the status of the estate and requests a continuance of three weeks to finalize an accounting.

The Status on Close of Estate is continued to Oct-10-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-09-2022 Continued To Jun-06-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Vincent Yu, via Zoom, for Thomas Lucas, Administrator.

Counsel offers the court a report regarding the delay with this matter and believes that a petition for termination of the estate may be filed soon due to lack of assets.

The Status on Close of Estate is continued to Jun-06-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-10-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jessie Burgueno and Vincent Yu, via ZOOM, co-counsel for Thomas Lucas, Petitioner.

At the outset, counsel is queried as to what evidence has been provided to the court to support due diligence in locating the lost Will. Counsel advises that the decedent had moved several times and the Will was likely lost in transit and the original has not been located. After additional discussion, the court asks in open court if there are any objections to the court admitting the Will, no objections are presented. The Petition for Probate of Lost Will and of Administration with Will Annexed is taken under submission with the intent to grant the petition. The lost will dated January 11, 2007, is admitted to probate. Thomas Lucas is appointed as Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Status on close of estate is set for May 9, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed one week prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
